description: Maps Five Parsecs Story Track events to Battle Companion tool tutorials

companion_tools.hint: Use the Battle Journal to track story evidence discovered during missions
Set mission objectives related to investigating the signal source
Roll investigation checks to gather clues about the mysterious transmission

discovery_signal.story_context: Your crew has detected an unusual signal. The Battle Companion tools can help you investigate safely.

companion_tools.hint: Calculate initiative bonuses for potential first contact scenarios
Roll reaction dice to determine the contact's initial disposition
Assess combat readiness before approaching unknown contacts
Check crew member stats for social/negotiation encounters

first_contact.story_context: Another party is searching for the same thing. Use these tools to prepare for contact.

companion_tools.hint: Generate corporate security forces that may oppose your investigation
Corporate facilities have special deployment conditions (limited entry points, surveillance)
Track morale when facing well-equipped corporate forces
Review weapon penetration vs. corporate armor

conspiracy_revealed.story_context: You've uncovered corporate involvement. These tools help you plan infiltration missions.

companion_tools.hint: Calculate hit chances and damage against escalated threats
Monitor crew health and injuries as danger increases
Record critical moments and casualties as stakes rise

dangerous_escalation.story_context: The situation is escalating. Use these tools to manage increased danger.

companion_tools.hint: Set final mission objectives for the story track climax
Document the story conclusion and its impact on your campaign
Roll for final story outcomes and consequences

final_revelation.story_context: You've reached the truth. These tools help you resolve the story track.

companion_tools.hint: Review the complete story arc and its effects on your crew

story_aftermath.story_context: The story has concluded. Reflect on your choices and their consequences.

first_battle.hint: Start with these essential tools to track your first battle

combat_focused.hint: Use these tools for detailed combat calculations

tactical_planning.hint: Plan tactical approaches with battlefield analysis tools
